footer.description: WorldPDF provides free, fast, and secure online tools for processing PDFs.

seo.homeTitle: WorldPDF - Free Online PDF Tools | Merge, Compress, Convert & More
seo.homeDescription: Free online PDF tools. Merge, compress, convert, edit, and organize PDFs securely in your browser. No uploads required. 100% free.

hero.title: Online tools for PDF lovers
hero.subtitle: Free online PDF tools to merge, split, compress, convert, and edit PDF files. Convert Office documents to PDF, or PDF to JPG and vice-versa, without any software installation.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by millions of users worldwide

features.title: Why WorldPDF?
features.secureDesc: Files never leave your device. Enterprise-grade encryption.
features.fastDesc: Powered by WebAssembly for near-native processing speeds.
features.freeDesc: All tools are completely free with no hidden limits.
features.qualityDesc: Professional-grade output you can rely on every time.

categories.title: All Tools

trust.title: Trusted by Millions

pdf.title: PDF Tools

pdf.metaTitle: Free PDF Tools Online - Merge, Compress, Convert & Edit PDFs | WorldPDF
pdf.metaDescription: Free online PDF tools. Merge PDFs, compress PDF files, convert PDF to Word/Excel/JPG, edit PDF text and images. No upload required. 100% free.

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one document

compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.description: Reduce PDF file size without quality loss

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable DOC & DOCX documents

pdfToPowerpoint.description: Convert PDF files to editable PPT & PPTX presentation slides

pdfToExcel.title: PDF to Excel
pdfToExcel.description: Extract table data from PDF files to Excel worksheets

powerpointToPdf.title: PowerPoint to PDF
powerpointToPdf.description: Convert PowerPoint presentations to PDF files

excelToPdf.description: Convert Excel spreadsheets to PDF documents

edit.title: Edit PDF

pdfToJpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdfToJpg.description: Convert each PDF page to JPG or extract embedded images

jpgToPdf.title: JPG to PDF
jpgToPdf.description: Convert JPG, PNG, or WebP images to PDF documents

sign.title: Sign PDF
sign.description: Add electronic signatures and initials to PDF documents

split.title: Split PDF

watermark.description: Add text or image watermarks to PDF files

htmlToPdf.description: Convert HTML webpage URL or markup to PDF

unlock.description: Remove password and copying restrictions from PDF files

repair.title: Repair PDF
repair.description: Repair corrupted PDF files and recover page elements

pageNumbers.description: Add page numbers to PDF documents with customizable layouts

scanToPdf.description: Capture images using your camera and compile into a PDF

redact.description: Permanently mask sensitive text and graphics in PDF files

crop.description: Crop page margins and trim borders from PDF pages
